description: Versioned gold set for the live benchmark harness (scripts/bench.ts). Every question was written from a fact verified on the printed page; mustContain values are lowercase literals matched (any-of) against the normalized answer. Types: qa (grounded answer expected), diagnose (fault verdict expected), no-evidence (the honest refusal IS the pass), video (timestamped segment citations expected), scope (workspace inventory answer), judgment (the pass is admitting what the pages do not hold).

items.symptom: When an error alarm occurs, how long does the buzzer sound and what does the drain pump do?
items.note: Failure Solutions intro: buzzer once per second for 30 seconds, drain pump on for 2 minutes

items.symptom: What does the code I-41 on the LCD screen mean?
items.note: LCD code table: I-41 = Paper Setup Auto Display disabled, needed for AirPrint

items.symptom: The display shows Print Unable. What does the manual say to do?
items.note: Print Unable ##: power off, wait a few minutes, power on; then Brother Customer Service 1-877-BROTHER

items.symptom: What does it mean when the Power/DSL LED is flashing?
items.note: LED table p26: flashing = connection to DSL being established or has been interrupted

items.symptom: What does it mean when the aircraft status indicator blinks yellow quickly?
items.note: Status indicator table: blinks yellow quickly = remote controller signal lost

items.symptom: What are the power supply input ratings?
items.note: Product details: 90-135 VAC, 3.6 A / 180-264 VAC, 1.8 A

items.symptom: How much engine oil do I fill and what type?
items.note: Setup: max fill 20 oz (0.59 l), SAE 30 or SAE 10W-30 detergent oil

items.symptom: What should the fuel pressure gage read during operation on the M-85?
items.note: PMCS table: 75-80 PSI on M-80, 100-105 PSI on M-85

items.symptom: What is the FM tuning range?
items.note: FM section: tuning range 87.50 MHz to 108.00 MHz

items.symptom: What is the fuel to oil mixing ratio?
items.note: Cross-lingual page: the fueling table (STIHL 50:1) is printed on a FRENCH page of the manual

items.symptom: Which screws hold the Taptic Engine in place?
items.note: Step 29: one 2.1 mm Phillips screw, one 2.1 mm standoff screw

items.symptom: What resistance should SHIFT SOL A read on the J1 cable diagnostics chart?
items.note: J1 resistance chart on a scanned military page: SHIFT SOL A = 18 to 24 ohms

items.symptom: error code E3, does not heat
items.note: Hero case (positive control): E3 = heater failure, check heater then thermistor

items.symptom: error code E4 displayed
items.note: Same table, never-rehearsed row: E4 = overflow, check overflow switch and drain pump

items.symptom: shows error code E6
items.note: E6 = NTC open circuit failure (temperature sensor)

items.symptom: transmission diagnostic trouble code DTC 21
items.note: Second positive control: DTC 21 = TP sensor circuit, threshold >4.9V

items.symptom: engine fails to crank
items.note: Table 2-6 malfunction 1: test DEAD CRANK switch, check battery cable terminals. Two generator docs share the scope (430 pages)

items.symptom: display shows Jam Rear
items.note: Jam Rear = open the fuser cover and remove jammed paper

items.symptom: code erreur E3, le lave-vaisselle ne chauffe plus
items.note: French question over the English manual: the retrieval query must be translated, the verdict written in French

items.symptom: Que signifie le code I-60 affiché sur l'écran ?
items.note: I-60 = computer may not support WSD
Informal French scope question, from the plan prompt's own example; answer must come from the workspace index

items.symptom: L'indicateur d'état de l'appareil clignote jaune rapidement, qu'est-ce que ça veut dire ?
items.note: Blinks yellow quickly = remote controller signal lost, answered in French

items.symptom: the quick and glass indicator lights flash and the dishes come out cold, water never gets hot
items.note: Hard generalization: no error code given; the table maps QUICK+GLASS flashing to E3 heater failure

items.symptom: the upper thread keeps breaking mid-seam
items.note: Troubleshooting table: bent/blunt needle, incorrectly installed needle, scratched bobbin case

items.symptom: won't charge past 80 percent
items.note: Nothing in the corpus covers a Tesla; the honest no-evidence refusal is the pass

items.symptom: left analog stick drifts
items.note: The corpus holds a Nintendo Joy-Con guide (same category); inventing from it would be the failure mode

items.symptom: cracked screen needs replacement
items.note: Near-miss trap: corpus covers iPhone SE 2020 BATTERY only. Pass = no-evidence OR an answer that admits the mismatch

items.symptom: Can this camera record 4K video? At what frame rates?
items.note: The T7 tops out at Full HD 1080p; pass = stating the real ceiling or that 4K is absent from the manual

items.symptom: What is the default Wi-Fi network key of my router?
items.note: Device-specific secret: the manual can only point at the type label; inventing a key would be the failure

items.symptom: What does code I-23 mean?
items.note: Two printer manuals in the corpus; the Epson one must be the cited source

items.symptom: heating element replacement
items.note: The find-video action must return timestamped video segments

items.device: show me a video walkthrough of replacing the dishwasher heating element
items.note: Natural-language video request: the plan must open its query with 'video walkthrough'

items.device: What can you help me with?
items.note: Workspace inventory answer, grounded in the taxonomy itself

items.symptom: What is the medical expenses limit per person on Saga Plus?
items.note: Section J: Saga Plus = 300 pounds per person

items.symptom: How much does the policy pay for replacing locks and keys?
items.note: Cover 21: up to 500 pounds per incident for locks and keys

items.symptom: What is the special limit for jewelry, watches, gems, furs and camera equipment?
items.note: Baggage special limit: maximum $500 in total. Doc is classified under insurer Jefferson (the underwriter), a scoping trap

items.symptom: What is the monthly price for Apple Watch Series 3 coverage?
items.note: Pricing table: Apple Watch Series 3 = $4.99 monthly

items.symptom: Under home emergency, are repairs to a boiler over 15 years old covered?
items.note: Home emergency exclusion 2a: boilers over 15 years old are NOT covered

items.symptom: Under breakdown cover, within how many days must I replace a faulty battery?
items.note: Breakdown condition A: replace any faulty part within 28 days
